posts.title: Zalith Launcher 博客上线
posts.description: Zalith Launcher 博客正式上线，后续会发开发日志、教程和版本更新。
posts.content:
Zalith Launcher 博客上线

博客开了，以后会在这里更新一些内容。

内容方向

开发日志

同步开发进度，包括：

  • 新功能预览
  • 性能优化
  • Bug 修复

教程

怎么用好 Zalith Launcher：

  • 安装和配置
  • 常见问题
  • 进阶用法

版本更新

重要版本会发更新日志：

  • 新特性
  • 已知问题
  • 升级建议

获取更新

  • 常来看看博客
  • 关注 GitHub 仓库
  • 加入 Discord 社区

反馈

有问题或建议：

  • GitHub Issues
  • Discord 社区
  • QQ 群组
posts.excerpt: Zalith Launcher 博客正式上线，后续会发开发日志、教程和版本更新。

posts.title: Zalith Launcher Blog is Live
posts.description: The Zalith Launcher blog is live. Expect dev logs, tutorials, and release notes here.
posts.content:
Zalith Launcher Blog is Live

Blog is up and running. We'll be posting updates here.

What to Expect

Dev Logs

Progress updates on what we're working on:

  • New feature previews
  • Performance improvements
  • Bug fixes

Tutorials

Making the most of Zalith Launcher:

  • Installation and setup
  • Common questions
  • Advanced tips

Release Notes

Changelogs for important releases:

  • What's new
  • Known issues
  • Upgrade notes

Stay Updated

  • Check back here for new posts
  • Watch the GitHub repo
  • Join the Discord community

Feedback

Questions or suggestions:

  • GitHub Issues
  • Discord Community
  • QQ Group
posts.excerpt: The Zalith Launcher blog is live. Expect dev logs, tutorials, and release notes here.
